title: glandularia maritima
intro: Glandularia maritima, also known as Marsh Pink, is a perennial herb native to South America, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Glandularia maritima include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Glandularia maritima is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers are used for medicinal purposes.
